searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 5 · 09:00–12:00
searchDocuments.body: The Hari Hong Kong · Hong Kong · Arrive HKG and settle the Hong Kong base. Payments, eSIM/VPN, and maps readiness. · Land HKG · Airport Express to Wan Chai · Octopus card · eSIM/VPN · payments check · Check-in · light recovery, no over-scheduling

searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 6 · 10:00–12:00
searchDocuments.body: Hong Kong Polytechnic University · Hong Kong · PolyU-hosted sharing on technology transfer and entrepreneurship & innovation.

searchDocuments.title: LEAP East prep · badge & exhibitor setup
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 6 · 13:00–16:00
searchDocuments.body: HKCEC — LEAP East · Hong Kong · Priority 0 before the show: badge registration, exhibitor app access, and booth readiness ahead of the Jul 7 setup deadline. · Badge & Customer Center registration · Exhibitor app access · lead capture ready · Booth setup deadline · Jul 7 evening

searchDocuments.title: Networking mixer at Alibaba
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 6 · 16:00–18:00
searchDocuments.body: Hong Kong · Early networking / market-expansion mixer. Exact venue and routing to confirm.

searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 7 · 10:30–18:00
searchDocuments.body: Hong Kong Science Park · Hong Kong · HKSTP morning visit plus the organiser afternoon agenda and founder mixer. Gate pass required. · Science Park tour · showcase & Q&A · Why Hong Kong is Asia's tech launchpad · Keynote · agentic AI + startup demo day · Networking reception

searchDocuments.title: LEAP East at HKCEC — Day 1
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 8 · 09:00–17:00
searchDocuments.body: HKCEC — LEAP East · Hong Kong · LEAP East exhibition booths plus Rocket Fuel East semi-finals on the DeepFest stage. · Show open · booths & matchmaking · Ecosystem Xchange · First Money In · Rocket Fuel East · semi-finals round 1

searchDocuments.title: LEAP East at HKCEC — Day 2
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 9 · 09:00–17:00
searchDocuments.body: HKCEC — LEAP East · Hong Kong · LEAP East Day 2. Abdulrahman arrives HKG in the evening for handoff. · Show open · investor matchmaking · Xchange · capital-efficient cross-border · Rocket Fuel East · semi-finals round 2 · Abdulrahman lands · evening handoff

searchDocuments.title: LEAP East — Day 3 & Rocket Fuel Grand Finale
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 10 · 09:00–17:00
searchDocuments.body: HKCEC — LEAP East · Hong Kong · LEAP East Day 3 and the Grand Finale. Abdulrahman leads BD triage and investor follow-up. · Final day · close out matchmaking · Rocket Fuel Grand Finale · Main Stage · Winners announced · Lead triage · owner assignment

searchDocuments.title: Free day · Kowloon & Bruce Lee trail
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 11 · 10:00–20:00
searchDocuments.body: Hong Kong · The one open Hong Kong day: Heritage Museum, Avenue of Stars, Kowloon. Also the fallback window for a Science Park business visit. · Heritage Museum · Bruce Lee exhibition · Avenue of Stars · TST waterfront · Fallback window · Science Park visit

searchDocuments.title: Hong Kong → Shenzhen · border crossing & base move
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 12 · 12:00–15:00
searchDocuments.body: Ascott Raffles City Shenzhen · Shenzhen · Check out of the Hong Kong base by 12:00, then Wan Chai to Nanshan. Confirm the border plan and Shenzhen check-in before moving. · Check out · Hong Kong base · Border crossing → Nanshan · Ascott check-in · confirm key collection

searchDocuments.title: Week 2 kickoff · InnoX mentors & KAUST Shenzhen Hub
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 13 · 10:00–12:00
searchDocuments.body: InnoX · KAUST Shenzhen Hub · Shenzhen · 1:1 mentor support and tailored plan. Prepare Pure Advance intro asks before this week. · Mentor intro requests · partner asks ready

searchDocuments.title: Week 3 · Enterprise & supply-chain visits
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 20 · 10:00–16:00
searchDocuments.body: Shenzhen / GBA · Enterprise visits and 1:1 supply-chain matching across the Greater Bay Area. · Enterprise visits · 1:1 supply-chain matching

searchDocuments.title: Demo Day — final pitch before investors & delegation
searchDocuments.subtitle: JUL 31 · 14:00–17:00
searchDocuments.body: Shenzhen / GBA · Demo Day in Shenzhen — pitch, validation checklist, and 90-day plan before investors and the delegation.

searchDocuments.title: Checkout & return · Hong Kong → Riyadh
searchDocuments.subtitle: AUG 1 · 15:00–20:10
searchDocuments.body: Ascott Raffles City Shenzhen · Shenzhen · Shenzhen checkout and cross-border transfer to HKG for the evening return; arrives Riyadh Aug 2.

searchDocuments.title: Bluepha
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 蓝晶微生物（北京蓝晶微生物科技有限公司） · A leading Chinese synthetic-biology / PHA-biopolymer company with large-scale fermentation — a sector benchmark for ultra-high-density fermentation, but not a Shenzhen/GBA visit target. · Beijing (HQ); Yancheng, Jiangsu (production) · Other

searchDocuments.title: MegaRobo
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 镁伽 · A Beijing-headquartered embodied-AI-for-the-lab company fusing robotics automation and AI to build intelligent, self-running biological laboratories (MEGALAB) — the infrastructure layer under AI drug discovery, synthetic biology and bioprocess; included as a benchmark/ecosystem reference, with HQ in Beijing rather than the GBA. · Shenzhen branch (HQ Beijing) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: OPPO
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Corp
searchDocuments.body: 广东欧珀移动通信有限公司 · One of the world's largest smartphone makers, founded and still headquartered in Dongguan, with its core R&D, advanced testing and smart manufacturing concentrated in Chang'an Town. · Chang'an Town, Dongguan (Binhaiwan Bay) · Dongguan

searchDocuments.title: vivo
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Corp
searchDocuments.body: 维沃移动通信有限公司 · A top-tier global smartphone maker headquartered in Chang'an Town, Dongguan, running one of the region's largest integrated phone manufacturing complexes. · Chang'an Town, Dongguan (Binhai New Area) · Dongguan

searchDocuments.title: XbotPark (Songshan Lake Robotics Base)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Ecosystem
searchDocuments.body: 松山湖国际机器人产业基地 · A hardware-first startup incubator beside Songshan Lake that turns Dongguan's dense supply chain into a fast, cheap path from prototype to product — with a track record of producing robotics unicorns. · Songshan Lake, Dongguan · Dongguan

searchDocuments.title: Guangdong Victory Biotech
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广东冠昊生物科技有限公司 · A Foshan medical-grade collagen biomaterials manufacturer making atelocollagen, cross-linked collagen hydrogels and collagen wound dressings — a strong fit for Coolvex's skin-repair / barrier / retention biomaterials angle. · Nanhai District, Foshan · Foshan

searchDocuments.title: Ausmetics Daily Chemicals
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Sourcing
searchDocuments.body: 澳斯曼 · An export-oriented, audit-heavy cosmetic OEM/ODM (since 1998; 600+ brands; bases in Guangzhou/Dongguan/Zengcheng) with sensitive-skin and natural collections — a partner to turn a chosen Coolvex active into a compliant finished ointment. · Guangzhou Economic & Technological Development District · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Canton Biologics (Hanten Biotech)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广州汉腾生物科技有限公司 · South China's largest large-molecule biologics CDMO — antibody/recombinant-protein focused, with strong process development and downstream and ~13,000 L GMP capacity across two GBA bases. A credible recombinant-protein and (smaller) microbial-fermentation partner, with the caveat that the core is mammalian CHO antibody work. · Guangzhou (HQ); Foshan Kunlun & Guangzhou Penglai GMP bases · Guangzhou
searchDocuments.city: Guangzhou (HQ); Foshan Kunlun & Guangzhou Penglai GMP bases

searchDocuments.title: Kingfa Science & Technology
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 金发科技股份有限公司 · A large listed advanced-materials maker (modified plastics, biodegradable plastics, bio-based materials) growing a green-biomanufacturing arm — relevant for materials/packaging adjacency, not active-ingredient fermentation. · Guangzhou Science City, Huangpu · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Marubi Biotech
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 丸美生物技术股份有限公司 · A listed Guangzhou skincare company that has built real recombinant-collagen and fermentation R&D (500+ patents) around barrier repair and anti-ageing — a science-led GBA player to learn from, though access for a small partner may be harder. · Guangzhou Science City, Huangpu · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Guangzhou Institute of Microbiology Group
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广州市微生物研究所集团股份有限公司（广微集团） · A 50-year-old Guangzhou-municipal microbiology institute (now a state-controlled joint-stock group) that operates the Guangdong Provincial Microbial Germplasm Resource Bank and does microbial fermentation, biopharma and bio-product R&D — an institutional microbial-strain resource with deep collections and screening capability. · Huangpu District, Science City · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: MoonBio (Moon Guangzhou Biotech)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 慕恩（广州）生物科技有限公司 · Guangzhou's strongest pilot-fermentation lead — a microbial-resource-and-biomanufacturing platform selected onto China's first national biomanufacturing pilot-platform list, with a very large proprietary strain library and a full-chain discovery-to-scale-up process. · Huangpu District, Science City (Guangzhou High-tech Zone) · Guangzhou
searchDocuments.city: Huangpu District, Science City (Guangzhou High-tech Zone)

searchDocuments.title: NIKOO Chemical
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Sourcing
searchDocuments.body: 广州尼酷化工有限公司 · A Guangzhou skincare-raw-material supplier and custom-solution house with an unusually Coolvex-relevant catalogue — recombinant collagens, repair/anti-sensitisation peptides, bio-fermented filtrates, and a recombinant mussel adhesive protein (a bioadhesive skin-barrier active). · Baiyun District · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: SCSIO — Marine Materia Medica (CAS)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Ecosystem
searchDocuments.body: 中国科学院南海海洋研究所 · The CAS South China Sea Institute of Oceanology's Guangdong Key Lab of Marine Materia Medica — China's best-placed marine-microbial natural-products lab for antimicrobial/antioxidant actives, and the most travel-accessible marine institute (in Guangzhou). · Haizhu District · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Tidetron Bioworks (Taichuang)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 态创生物（Tidetron） · A fast-funded Guangzhou synthetic-biology multi-substance mass-production platform built on an intelligent fermentation system — peptides and small molecules at a claimed 10,000-tonne-plus annual capacity. A credible GBA fermentation-platform lead, with several specifics still to confirm. · Haizhu District · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Guangzhou Tinci Materials
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Sourcing
searchDocuments.body: 广州天赐高新材料股份有限公司 · A leading manufacturer of functional personal-care ingredients (SZSE-listed, stock code 002709) — the mild surfactant/emulsifier/stabiliser backbone for a sensitive-area topical, complementing whatever hero active is chosen. · Guangzhou Economic & Technological Development District · Guangzhou

searchDocuments.title: Yikewei Bio
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广东益可维生物技术有限公司 · A Guangzhou probiotics company built around a proprietary 'native Chinese' probiotic strain resource library — it isolates, banks and commercialises functional strains and supplies strains plus whole-process technical solutions across dairy, functional food, pharma, agriculture and daily-chemicals. · Guangzhou Development Zone / Sino-Singapore Guangzhou Knowledge City (中新广州知识城) · Guangzhou
searchDocuments.city: Guangzhou Development Zone / Sino-Singapore Guangzhou Knowledge City (中新广州知识城)

searchDocuments.title: AilsynBio
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: HKU-spun-out, Science Park-based AI drug-design startup that fuses generative AI with physics-based modelling — and has signed a deal applying AI to traditional Chinese medicine. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: BioMap
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 百图生科 · Baidu-backed 'large biology model' company whose 100B+-parameter life-science foundation model xTrimo powers an AI-Generated Protein (AIGP) platform — now standing up its first international innovation center, BioMap InnoHub, in Hong Kong with HK government (HKIC) backing. · BioMap InnoHub, Hong Kong (specific HKSTP/Cyberport site to be confirmed) · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: BioMap InnoHub, Hong Kong (specific HKSTP/Cyberport site to be confirmed)

searchDocuments.title: BioMed Technology Holdings
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: Hong Kong microbiome startup and HKSTP partner offering precision microbiome testing and probiotic products — and expanding into oral and skin microbiomes, the axis closest to Coolvex's topical-care focus. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: GenieBiome (G-NiiB)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: CUHK clinician-scientist microbiome spinout behind the consumer G-NiiB probiotic brand — Hong Kong's most consumer-facing, clinically-credentialed microbiome company and the closest peer to a Coolvex-style functional-health play. · Wan Chai / Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Wan Chai / Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: Great Bay Bio
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 大湾生物 · HKSTP-based 'AI + bioprocessing' company that applies AI to the manufacturing/CMC side of biologics — antibody design, cell-line development, culture-media optimization and sequence/expression optimization — i.e. the AI-in-biomanufacturing layer, not just AI drug discovery. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: GUTolution
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: A Hong Kong Science Park microbiome health-tech startup that runs an in-house sequencing lab, tests 5,000+ gut bacteria, and uses an AI engine to tailor-make and GMP-manufacture personalised probiotic formulas — the most relevant HK-based, consumer-facing precision-probiotic platform for a Week-1 Hong Kong meeting. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: Insilico Medicine
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 英矽智能 · End-to-end generative-AI drug discovery company, newly listed on HKEX, that both discovered and designed an oral IPF drug now heading to Phase III — with a parallel longevity/aging research agenda and an existing Gulf footprint. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: Pinnacle Food Group / Bioboost (HK precision-fermentation lab)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: The most concrete Hong Kong precision-fermentation node found: a Pichia-yeast recombinant-protein lab (human lactoferrin) run via a Bioboost Synbio collaboration, with a proposed open-yeast-platform hub at the HK–Shenzhen I&T Park. Early-stage R&D, not a turnkey CDMO — a relationship/ecosystem lead, not a manufacturing vendor yet. · Hong Kong (lab location to verify); proposed hub at HK–Shenzhen Innovation & Technology Park, Lok Ma Chau Loop · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong (lab location to verify); proposed hub at HK–Shenzhen Innovation & Technology Park, Lok Ma Chau Loop

searchDocuments.title: Avant — Zellulin (HK Science Park)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Sourcing
searchDocuments.body: A Hong Kong Science Park biotech (founded 2018) whose Zellulin / ZelluGEN is a cell-cultivated marine-protein peptide complex for skincare — a differentiated, sustainable marine-repair active reachable during the Hong Kong leg. · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Hong Kong
searchDocuments.city: Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok

searchDocuments.title: Angelo Biotech
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 安各洛（深圳）生物科技有限公司 · A Guangming synthetic-biology company specialised in functional proteins/enzymes (SOD, NAMPT) made via novel bioreactors and plant/insect cell factories — a possible antioxidant-active niche, but unproven as an external fermentation service provider. · Guangming District (Industrial Innovation Center for Engineering Biology) · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: Guangming District (Industrial Innovation Center for Engineering Biology)

searchDocuments.title: BGI Genomics (GeneT / GBI ALL)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 华大基因（GeneT / 生成式生物智能） · Shenzhen-headquartered genomics giant whose GeneT (Genetic Transformer) multimodal genomic foundation model anchors its 'Generative Bio-Intelligence (GBI ALL)' paradigm — and which already runs a large AI-genomics operation inside Saudi Arabia (Genalive, Riyadh), making it the most Saudi-relevant company in this AI-biotech batch. · Yantian District (BGI HQ) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: BGI Precision Nutrition (Umeta)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 华大营养 / 华大精准营养（深圳）科技有限公司（优美达） · BGI's (华大) precision-nutrition arm sits on one of the largest human-commensal microbial strain libraries in China — 50,000–60,000+ gut/commensal strains built on BGI's sequencing scale — and runs a full 'test → functional probiotic → nutrition' chain; it is the single biggest microbial-resource-discovery asset in the GBA and a credible strain / data / co-research partner. · Yantian District (BGI Center) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Biosysen
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 倍生生物科技（深圳）有限公司 · A Shenzhen (Guangming Science City) 'software-defined' synthetic-biology house that designs and licenses engineered industrial microbial strains — it explicitly runs a strain library (ArchiCel®) and a strain-licensing business plus a daily-chemicals (日化) pipeline, so it maps directly onto Pure Advance's microbial-cell-factory + bio-derived-actives priority. · Guangming District (Fenghuang Subdistrict) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Bloomage TangAn
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 华熙唐安生物科技（深圳）有限公司 · A Bloomage-incubated synbio company in Guangming building a world-leading non-animal heparin/glycan platform via full-enzymatic synthesis — strong glycan/biomaterials pedigree, but not an open pilot-fermentation CDMO. · Guangming District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: BYD Company Limited
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Corp
searchDocuments.body: 比亚迪股份有限公司 · A vertically integrated Shenzhen manufacturing giant — the world's largest plug-in EV maker — that also runs one of the planet's biggest electronics contract-manufacturing (EMS) arms. · Pingshan District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Shenzhen GSH Bio-Technology
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 深圳市古特生物技术有限公司 · A Shenzhen-headquartered fermentation-ingredient company specialising in glutathione and NMN — a convenient Nanshan-based meeting on a relevant antioxidant active, though its actual fermentation plants sit outside the GBA. · Nanshan District (Shenzhen Bay tech park) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Guangxin Bio-manufacturing
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广新生物智造技术创新（深圳）有限公司 · A Guangming biomanufacturing-innovation platform tied to the Guangdong Guangxin / state-owned ecosystem and SIAT — strategically connected as a co-founder of the national center, but with no clear public BD channel or confirmed external-service offering. · Guangming District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Hetao Shenzhen–Hong Kong Science & Technology Innovation Cooperation Zone
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Ecosystem
searchDocuments.body: 河套深港科技创新合作区 · A small cross-border innovation zone straddling the Shenzhen–Hong Kong boundary in Futian, purpose-built to let researchers, capital and materials move between the two systems — including a dedicated biopharma cluster. · Futian District (Hetao) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: iCarbonX
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 碳云智能 · Shenzhen 'digital life' company building an AI platform that fuses multi-omics (genome, metabolome, microbiome) with lifestyle data to model individual health — an early, ambitious AI-multi-omics play whose mid-2010s hype has cooled and whose current momentum is unclear. · Nanshan · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Lenovo (Shenzhen — South Smart Campus)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · Corp
searchDocuments.body: 联想 · Lenovo's most critical global supply-chain and R&D hub sits in Shenzhen, anchored by its new 'mother factory' — a showcase of AI-accelerated smart manufacturing. · Lenovo South Smart Campus (LSSC) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: National Biomanufacturing Industry Innovation Center (+ Xinmei / Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 国家生物制造产业创新中心（及新湖/银星合成生物产业园） · China's first national-level biomanufacturing innovation platform, purpose-built to close the '1→10' lab-to-pilot scale-up gap — the single best ecosystem gateway to actual pilot-fermentation capacity and tenant companies in Guangming. · Guangming Science City, Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: Guangming Science City, Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park

searchDocuments.title: PAM²L Biotechnologies
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 柏垠生物（深圳柏垠生物科技有限公司） · The most Coolvex-specific biomaterial lead in the shortlist — a Shenzhen synthetic-biology company whose star molecule is a recombinant mussel adhesive protein with skin-repair, anti-inflammatory and wet-adhesion properties. · Shenzhen synthetic-biology cluster (SIAT-origin; district not verified) · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: Shenzhen synthetic-biology cluster (SIAT-origin; district not verified)

searchDocuments.title: Readline Biotech (Ruidelin)
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 深圳瑞德林生物技术股份有限公司 · Shenzhen synthetic-biology / enzyme-catalysis company with its own pilot lines in Shenzhen and ton-to-hundred-ton production lines in Zhuhai — a strong scale-up partner for peptides, sugars and specialty actives, and a credible candidate for external process development / custom manufacturing. · Nanshan District / Hi-Tech Park (HQ); Zhuhai and Gansu (Baiyin) production bases · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: Nanshan District / Hi-Tech Park (HQ); Zhuhai and Gansu (Baiyin) production bases

searchDocuments.title: Synthetica Pioneering (Shengbao Bio)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Watchlist · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 深圳市生葆生物科技有限公司 · A SIAT-incubated synthetic-biology startup developing engineered living bacterial therapeutics for solid tumours — strong investors and synbio pedigree, but far from pilot-fermentation manufacturing for a topical product. · SIAT-incubated (Shenzhen; precise district not verified) · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Shenzhen Bay Laboratory
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Ecosystem
searchDocuments.body: 深圳湾实验室 · A flagship Guangdong/Shenzhen biomedical research institute in Guangming Science City, focused on the discovery, diagnosis and treatment of major diseases — the most on-brand stop on the program for Pure Advance. · Guangming Science City, Guangming District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: SIAT / iSynBio — Shenzhen Institute of Synthetic Biology & Synthetic Biology Infrastructure
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 中科院深圳先进技术研究院 合成生物学研究所（深圳合成生物研究重大科技基础设施） · The academic and biofoundry backbone of the Guangming synbio cluster — China's first synthetic-biology institute, operating the world's largest synthetic-biology research infrastructure and the institutional lead behind the national biomanufacturing center. · Guangming Science City, Guangming District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: SiyoBio (Zhongke Xinyang)
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 深圳中科欣扬生物科技有限公司 · A Shenzhen synthetic-biology company that runs microbial cell factories at industrial fermentation scale and sells COSMOS-certified skin actives (ectoin, ergothioneine) — a credible local fermentation + ingredient partner. · Longgang District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: Synceres Biosciences
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 森瑞斯生物科技（深圳）有限公司 · The strongest direct fermentation-and-active-ingredient lead in Guangming: a synthetic-biology R&D-and-production company whose own catalogue already includes squalane, ectoine and ergothioneine. · Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park, Guangming District · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park, Guangming District

searchDocuments.title: Xbiome
searchDocuments.subtitle: Medium · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 未知君 · Shenzhen clinical-stage, AI-driven microbiome drug developer that also does consumer-facing functional probiotics and strain licensing — the most credible China microbiome bridge to a consumer-health brand like Coolvex. · Tsinghua Information Port, Nanshan District · Shenzhen

searchDocuments.title: XtalPi
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · AI/Bio
searchDocuments.body: 晶泰科技 · Shenzhen-founded, HK-listed quantum-physics-plus-AI drug discovery platform serving most of global big pharma — the Shenzhen counterpart to Insilico for AI-native discovery, and a strong platform-benchmarking peer. · International Biomedical Industrial Park, Futian District · Shenzhen
searchDocuments.city: International Biomedical Industrial Park, Futian District

searchDocuments.title: Gene-Biocon
searchDocuments.subtitle: Must contact · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 珠海冀百康生物科技有限公司 · A Zhuhai recombinant-protein house that makes recombinant humanized collagen, growth factors, peptides and ferment-lysate actives — and openly offers a CDMO service — making it a one-stop fit for Coolvex's skin-repair ingredient and contract-manufacturing needs. · Xinqing Sci-Tech Industrial Park · Zhuhai

searchDocuments.title: VTR Bio-Tech
searchDocuments.subtitle: High · Biomfg
searchDocuments.body: 广东溢多利生物科技股份有限公司 · A 30+ year, publicly-listed Zhuhai industrial-fermentation company — one of China's largest enzyme-preparation makers — running large-scale microbial fermentation and downstream across multiple GBA and national bases. The strongest 'real industrial fermentation plant' lead near the trip. · Nanping Science & Technology Industrial Park · Zhuhai

# China 2026 Flight Briefing

Classification: App-safe operational export
Generated: 2026-07-03T23:16:20.845Z
Source pack: china-2026 v1.0.0
Do not forward outside the Pure Advance travel context.
Refresh after landing before acting on time-sensitive details.

## Trip at a glance

Hong Kong Week 1 (Go Global from GBA) with LEAP East at HKCEC Jul 8-10, then the Shenzhen Tech Founders program through Demo Day on Jul 31.

- China 2026 · Tech Founders · Hong Kong / Shenzhen Greater Bay Area
- JUL 4 – AUG 2
- Week 1 · HK — Go Global from GBA (JUL 6 – JUL 12)
- Week 2 · SZ — Innovation Growth Engine (JUL 13 – JUL 17)
- Week 3 · GBA — Supply Chain & Industrialization (JUL 20 – JUL 24)
- Week 4 · SZ — Integration & Demo Day (JUL 27 – JUL 31)

## Next 72 hours after landing

The first three mission days, JUL 5 onward — work them in order.

- JUL 5 · 09:00–12:00 — Arrival & Hong Kong base setup (The Hari Hong Kong · Hong Kong)
- JUL 6 · 10:00–12:00 — PolyU — tech-transfer & entrepreneurship sharing (Hong Kong Polytechnic University · Hong Kong)
- JUL 6 · 13:00–16:00 — LEAP East prep · badge & exhibitor setup (HKCEC — LEAP East · Hong Kong)
- JUL 6 · 16:00–18:00 — Networking mixer at Alibaba (Hong Kong)
- JUL 7 · 10:30–18:00 — Hong Kong Science Park — visit & founder mixer (Hong Kong Science Park · Hong Kong)

## LEAP East priorities

The HKCEC program block is the week-one anchor — badge first, then work the floor.

- JUL 6 · LEAP East prep · badge & exhibitor setup — Badge & Customer Center registration; Exhibitor app access · lead capture ready
- JUL 8 · LEAP East at HKCEC — Day 1 — Show open · booths & matchmaking; Ecosystem Xchange · First Money In
- JUL 9 · LEAP East at HKCEC — Day 2 — Show open · investor matchmaking; Xchange · capital-efficient cross-border
- JUL 10 · LEAP East — Day 3 & Rocket Fuel Grand Finale — Final day · close out matchmaking; Rocket Fuel Grand Finale · Main Stage

- Synceres Biosciences — Must contact · Biomfg · Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park, Guangming District · From the Nanshan base · Jul 13–31
- National Biomanufacturing Industry Innovation Center (+ Xinmei / Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park) — Must contact · Biomfg · Guangming Science City, Yinxing Synthetic Biology Industrial Park · From the Nanshan base · Jul 13–31

- Gene-Biocon — Must contact · Biomfg · Xinqing Sci-Tech Industrial Park · GBA day-trip · Weeks 2–4
- Great Bay Bio — Must contact · AI/Bio · Hong Kong Science Park, Pak Shek Kok · Best Jul 6–7 or Jul 11 · avoid Jul 8–10 (LEAP East)
